name: Feature request
about: Request a new feature or improvement for the Axle Chisel mod.
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Summary
Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

### Motivation
Why is this useful? What user problem does it solve?

### Proposed behavior
Explain how the feature should work from the player's perspective.

### Notes
Any technical considerations, compatibility concerns, or follow-up work.
